privileged_info_summary: The task expects output file 'NIST_Report_Final.docx' to be saved to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\. The hyphenation limit should be set to exactly 2 consecutive hyphens. The document must contain the text 'Risk management is the ongoing process' with the paragraph 'Keep lines together' setting applied. Success requires at least 70/100 points: Auto Hyphenation (30), Consecutive hyphen limit (20), Justified text on multiple paragraphs (20), Keep lines together on target paragraph (20), and file save (10).
